name: Trolls vs Vikings: Reborn
short_description: Reborn is a glorious, hardcore revival of the beloved lane-defense classic. As greedy Vikings march north in search of gold, the Troll Liberation Front rise to defend their lands. Far from a “place-and-wait” TD game, every second counts in this fierce, tactical fight.
detailed_description:
Not the dim-witted cave Trolls Tolkien and Hollywood sold you!

Reborn is a glorious, hardcore revival of the beloved lane-defense classic played by over 1.3 million players. Here Norse myth meets mayhem, deep tactical challenges await, and Troll power takes center stage.

Born in Norway, Trolls vs Vikings: Reborn unleashes the true Troll experience - ancient, stubborn, and fiercely loyal protectors of nature. As greedy Vikings and their gods march north in search of gold and glory, the Trolls rise to defend their lands with tactical wit, wild magic, and strikes so fierce even Odin thinks twice.

You Are The Troll Liberation Front - Crush the Viking Invasion!

Are you ready for some serious battle? Command a ragtag horde of the strangest, fiercest creatures ever to take up arms. Swipe, bash, dash, jump, and outsmart waves of gold-hungry Vikings fooled (of course) by Loki himself.

This isn’t a “place-and-wait” tower game. In Trolls Reborn every second demands fast decisions and faster hands: time spells, swap trolls, juggle resources, and react as chaos explodes across the field. Players call it the perfect blend of retro-hardcore tower defense and fresh new innovations, with a mix so balanced even Thor would nod in approval (then probably complain about the lack of mead).

Brutal Challenge. Fair Play. Maximum Mayhem

With the three difficulty levels Normal, Hard, and Brutal, plus tons of special missions and the legendary Endless Valhalla Mode, Reborn is built for TD strategy connoisseurs. No shortcuts, no pay-to-win, no divine intervention. Every victory is earned through skill, timing, and stubborn Troll grit.

A Soundtrack Worthy of the Nordic Gods

Featuring a brand-new score by Hollywood composer Aleksandar Dimitrijević, the Trolls themselves bring the music to life, literally. Critics have called it “one of the best TD soundtracks ever made.” Plug in your headphones and feel the mountain shake.

Beautifully Reborn

The entire graphical landscape is brimming with fresh new details, and all new animations by an Annie Award–nominated animation artist, giving the world more personality than ever. From lush forest to fiery battlefields, every frame bursts with Nordic charm and ridiculous detail.

Deeper Progression, Smarter Play

Customize your loadout before every battle: swap Trolls, tweak spells, and tailor your tactics to each unique challenge. It’s fair, flexible, and designed for those who crave mastery over mayhem.

Endless Valhalla Awaits

Think you’ve seen it all? The gods laugh! Push your limits in Endless Valhalla Mode, where waves never stop and sleep becomes optional.

A True Rebirth

Built from the ground up for Steam, Trolls vs Vikings: Reborn delivers a pure TD experience. No compromises, just classic TD lane defense strategy, reborn for modern players craving only the finest gameplay experience.

supported_languages:
English*, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Norwegian*, Portuguese - Brazil, Portuguese - Portugal
*languages with full audio support
